role_contract.title: Design / UX
role_contract.role: Design engine + experience simulation when UI/product feel in scope — emits a governed design packet and blocks generic template-grade design before build

measurements.predicted: design gate likely strong enough for founder-facing alpha
measurements.how_we_know_if_wrong: Founder alpha or SENTRY UI testing flags the result as generic, flat, or trust-damaging despite the simulation pass.
